title: lippia gehrtii
intro: Lippia gehrtii, also known as Mexican oregano or lippia, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the verbena family. Traditionally, Lippia gehrtii has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Lippia gehrtii can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried or fresh leaves for culinary and medicinal purposes.
